It was like breathing, it never stopped... even<br />in civilian life. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; There is a<br />girl crying, typing away at the phone. A little red frog on her shoulder, was<br />yell into her ear. Ash could only imagine what it must be saying. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">A little old lady is sitting inside a window at the nursing home. She is<br />knitting something, probably a blanket. A large man in all white, stands behind<br />her, smiling. He looks up at Ash, his smile fades slightly, and then returns.<br />He looks down to her again.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash could not see the figure </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">accompanying</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> each person, only certain ones, here and<br />there. Most were just clouds, or mist.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Don't worry so much." His doctor told him, "These may be<br />after affects from the war. As long as they do not interrupt your daily work,<br />or cause you to want to harm yourself </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">or others</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">, you should be fine. Consider yourself<br />lucky. Just think of them as </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">a</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">construct of your<br />active imagination, </span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">an<br />amusing distraction from the mundane realities of life." <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">He turned off the street between two old buildings, and up a well-worn path<br />into the woods, </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">his</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> refuge from the masses, to home. Ash opened<br />the front door. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">It wasn't a mansion by any means, but it was more than sufficient for him.<br />2,500 sq. ft., 4 bedrooms, a home theater, game room with pool table. Yes sir,<br />he had a fine cabin in the woods. All to himself. How he'd managed to live here<br />eight years and still not have a single friend invited over was a mystery, even<br />to himself. But he liked things just so. He liked the solitude. At least that's<br />what he told himself.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash took a seat on his second story balcony, overlooking the hills and<br />lake. He stared at nothing in particular for several hours. Then he laid down<br />in his hammock, bundled in the overpriced winter resistant sleeping bag. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">As sleep overtook him, he thought to himself "Yes sir, this is one<br />fine cabin."<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">***<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">An<br />explosion knocks him against a wall. He barely sees, through the smoke, troops<br />running about, hauling rubble off of bodies, checking pulses. Some are<br />screaming in pain. Others shouting to one another. Half the mess hall is<br />completely gone, all that is left is fire and rubble. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Ash can<br />feel the beat of his heart in his neck, his forehead rushed with sweat. He sees<br />them all running around, but all he hears is intense ringing. As the numbness<br />subsides from his brain, shock waves hit his chest as more buildings are<br />getting hit nearby. Ash uses the wall to steady himself, and works to stand on<br />his feet.<o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Others will<br />tend to the wounded. This band of Jihadist miscreants found upgraded weapons;<br />Russian no doubt. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Ash shoots<br />out the building, down the road to the artillery unit. He grabs his rifle and<br />heads for the highest structure, a radio tower toward the side of the camp. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">He can see<br />the launch area where the rockets are being fired from. He takes a few quick<br />breaths, hyperventilating floods the lungs with oxygen, one last deep breath in<br />and hold, steadies his body. Through the scope he can see about 10 of them.<br />They only have two missile launchers. They have very little cover, firing from<br />open desert, mostly hiding behind their Jeep, and a few large outcroppings of<br />fallen mountainside. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">He fires<br />two rounds back to back, taking out both missile launchers, one exploding in<br />the handlers face. Ash then begins firing one round after another as the<br />attackers fall like Coke cans on a fence post. The rounds hit their targets<br />with extreme prejudice. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Three<br />remain, cowering behind the Jeep. Jeeps are great vehicles for driving through tough<br />terrain quickly, but they are built light, not armored. He sees one peek<br />through the glass, gone. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">The other two<br />attempt to climb in the vehicle keeping their heads down and drive away. The<br />problem with that, is that both seats are occupied, both seats are easily<br />identifiable. He doesn't need to see them, only the back of their seats. Two.<br />One. The Jeep speeds up as it drives erratically, then crashes into a mound of<br />rocks. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash woke up...<br />another nightmare, if you can call a memory a nightmare. He rubbed his eyes,<br />and glanced to his wrist. Red numbers flooded his vision, 3:30 am. He rolled<br />over and went back to sleep. <i><o:p></o:p></i></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: center;"><br /><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">***<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">Visions<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">Desc: Eta has a dream<br />of the white room, wakes up and heads to a cafe' with her friend Janice. She<br />has premonitions that come true. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Brightness<br />greeted Eta when she aroused from a drug induced stupor. At least, that's what<br />she assumed as she was coming to, based on the physical effects she was<br />feeling... she must have relapsed again, blacked out... "I wonder what<br />bedroom I've wondered into this time..." she thought to herself. Eta's<br />muscles were sore and she felt the hard surface underneath, it felt cool on her<br />back. It must have been a kitchen floor, maybe tile, or hardwood?<o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">As she squinted, she saw simply bright<br />white... "It must have been one of 'those' parties…", she mumbled to<br />herself as she grimaced past sore muscles to get to her feet. But as the fog<br />cleared she found the resolve to sit up, find her bearings, look around.<br />Something didn't set right. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">As her mind rebooted; Eta became keenly aware<br />that nothing was right. This was no frat house, and she wasn't in college<br />anymore. That girl has been dead for many decades, and forgotten. At least she<br />tried to forget. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Drawing her groggy attention back to the<br />situation at hand her training started to kick in and she began to assess.<br />There were a large series of L.E.D. lights above, too bright to look directly<br />at. The ceiling was high, too high to reach. The room wasn't very big, square,<br />maybe twenty feet. She realized that her clothes had been changed and she was<br />wearing something akin to a white leotard or bicycle suit, with black trim. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">She kind of hoped to keep it when she was out<br />of here, it's nice.<o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Eta scanned the room, no doors, windows, no<br />escape. Only flat walls, she now realized were metal, as far as she could tell.<br />In the center of the room was a white table and one box. She approached<br />carefully and opened the box, assuming this must be the next step in whatever<br />weird situation she'd found herself. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"They said training would involve<br />untried methods. Maybe this is a training center and my next assignment.<br />'Escape the box with no escape "... Well… maybe she wasn't as good at<br />catchy mission names as she was with two Glocks at her side.<o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">When Eta opened the box all she found was a<br />plastic bag, with an iPhone. She turned it on.<o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">It booted silently...<o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">***<o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">She woke suddenly, but silently. As though she'd been awake for hours.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">The only thing weirder than waking from a weird dream, is waking inside of<br />a weird dream, only to then wake from that dream… But that was who Eta was<br />after all… weird was her middle name.&nbsp;<br />Well, ok, maybe not. But it sounded cooler than "Technical Sergeant<br />Nadine Etaine Romanakov", or "Lieutenant" as she was now known<br />by the Colorado Police Department.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">" 'Eta'... It's pronounced "Eh'---tuh", she'd had to be<br />deliberate in her pronunciation with a probie the other day. He was probably<br />just trying to get to her because of her odd </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">accent</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">or</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">because</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">she</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">was</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">a</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">chick</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">. </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Either</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">way</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> it worked, but he </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">probably</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> wished<br />it hadn't when she was done with him. You don't get </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">to</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">be</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">one</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">of</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">the</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">first</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">females</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">in</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">the</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> USAF </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">to</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">enter</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> combat,<br />or afterward onto the SWAT team, as a female, without being a bit feisty.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Eta glanced at the bare walls of her studio apartment. Eight years out of<br />the service, and she still hadn't bought a single painting, or decoration for<br />the room. This was not home, there is no home. This was a safe house… an eight<br />year safe house.&nbsp; <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">“Find</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">your</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">happy</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">place</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">girl</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">…” She closed her eyes, and in her mind Eta<br />saw a butterfly land on the window sill. A feeling of warmth flooded over her<br />for just a moment. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Her attention was broken by three short buzzes.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">The phone, Eta read the words on her screen. "coffee?" <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Janice was the one human odd enough to actually want Eta's company outside<br />of work. And she'd asked for three years before she finally said yes. But now…<br />it was a nice distraction. Maybe, she'd be willing to call Janice a </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">friend</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">?<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">She typed back, "Sure, be there in 10." She strapped on her dual<br />Glocks, rib holstered, and a jacket to cover. You never can be too careful.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Out the door into the wild white winter madness that is Colorado Springs. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Over at the café, Janice is still chattering away about the latest episode<br />of Blacklist, which Eta is normally very into. Today she just feels less<br />normal. That dream, it had gone away since she'd been doing her herbal teas,<br />but now it was back. Was this a relapse? <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Suddenly, Eta's world disappeared. In her mind's eye, she saw a waiter walk<br />by and trip on her purse, dropping the bottle of Perrier he was carrying,<br />shattering all over the floor, </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">contents</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">pouring</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">over</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">her</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">shoes</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">and</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">spraying</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">up</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">onto</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> Janice’s </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">lap</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">She turned to Janice who had stopped talking, and was now staring at Eta.<br />“You feeling' ok hun?”<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"I'm fine Janice, sorry… these darn headaches, what were you saying?”<br />Eta denied. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"You need something? I always carry the standards, generic of course…<br />same thing, less money…" <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Janice, I'm fine, really." Just then a waiter walked by with a<br />bottle of Perrier. He tripped on her purse, and she reached out and caught the<br />bottle before it hit the ground. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Whoa! Did you see what you just did?” Janice pushed up her glasses.<br />“You have amazing reflexes." She was always expressing how impressed she<br />was with Eta. She worked in Dispatch, but told Eta that she always dreamed of<br />being on SWAT like her. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;"Thank you." the waiter<br />said, and he moved on looking embarrassed. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Wow girl." Janice said. "You really are good.” Janice went<br />back to recanting the television show. Eta tried her best to appear interested,<br />she actually really enjoyed the show. But these day dreams, or whatever they<br />are, were getting out of control. It wasn't so bad at first. A few harmless day<br />dreams, followed by coincidences. But after eight years, they were getting hard<br />to manage. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Janice glanced over at the TV, a commercial about laundry soap. At the end,<br />a butterfly floats out of the towel and across the room, landing on the window<br />sill.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Hmm..." Eta said under her breath. Then, Janice disappeared.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Eta was somewhere else, far away. City<br />street. Cars driving by. People walking along, minding their own business, most<br />looking down at screens as if they were walking by GPS. Now there's people<br />running, the streets of roped off, and she can see people in jogging suits,<br />numbers on their back. Then her attention is drawn to a young man placing a<br />backpack in the trash can. She knows this place, but she's never been here. A<br />blinding flash of light. Glass splattering all over her. The percussion hits<br />her chest and…<o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">It's over... It's the same day dream she's been having for weeks now. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Oh my!" she hears from just behind her, she turns to see a<br />couple staring at the bar. Several others are slowly turning to see the<br />television as well.&nbsp; <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"An explosion went off at the Boston Marathon just moments ago…"<br />the reporter covered the information they had so far. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">…wait, did they say Boston? A sick feeling comes over her... is that even<br />possible? </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Glancing</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">at</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> the TV, she<br />sees the young man with the back pack, from her day dream, running away from<br />the scene in the news with all the other people. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Eta folds her head into her hands at stares at the T.V. in total shock. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"What is happening?" Eta whispers. "Excuse me, Janice, I<br />have to make a call. I have friends in that area. I'll see you later ok?" <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Without waiting for an answer, she </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">hurries</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">out</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">the</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">door</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">, </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">then</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> walks to a nearby payphone, which are<br />getting harder to come by these days, keeping her face from a clear line of<br />sight to any cameras she sees. She calls the F.B.I. hotline with an anonymous<br />tip regarding the bomber, and the news channel that had the photo. Then she<br />heads home… to process. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: center;"><br /><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">***<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">White Noise<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">Desc: Ash has a dream<br />of the white room, wakes up and heads to his coffee shop on the way to work.<br />Runs into Dr. Briar. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Bright<br />blinding white permeated the room. A white cardboard box sat on a thin snow<br />white metallic table in a small space covered in white painted titanium walls.<br />"How did I get here?” Ash mused to no one in particular. Looking down he<br />noticed the white form fitting uniform he was wearing. His deep tan the only<br />other contrast in this other clinically pure room. A soft hiss was coming from<br />the ceiling, but he couldn’t look up because the ceiling was lit from end to<br />end with bright LED’s, air conditioner maybe. He could barely see around him<br />without squinting. Disorientation started to settle down after the first few<br />moments awake, and he found his bearings. Training kicked in. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Thoughts<br />move to business, take stock. Name/Rank: "Captain Therun Ashland, USAF”, he<br />said out loud. No response. Taking inventory of his body, every part was<br />accounted for, legs, arms, toes, fingers, the scar on his neck under his right<br />ear. No pains, other than the usual. &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Ash<br />tried to recall his last memory before finding himself in this room void of any<br />obvious doors, windows, or openings of any kind, not even a seem was apparent<br />as he circled the room with his eyes and fingers. The thoughts came like rapid<br />fire. He didn’t bother with escape plans, not yet anyway, obviously he'd been<br />handled before arriving here and must be under surveillance this very moment.<br />No way to defend against attack without knowing where the openings are, but<br />there would be no use because if he were going to be killed he would be in some<br />dank prison cell not this white washed room in some overly tailored biking<br />suit. Still, better to be defensive and keep himself against a wall ready to<br />react. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; “Bring<br />it in Ash, bring yourself together… What is the last thing you recall? I was on<br />X-Island doing survival training in the South Pacific. I had just dropped in<br />from 15,000 feet. Working through the forest to the hacienda I had retaken the<br />residence and recovered the “stolen” technology, sent it back up on a UAV.<br />Routine training mission. I swam off island to a nearby island and was waiting<br />for my evac. There was a flash of light..."<o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; …that’s<br />it, there was no other memory. He woke up here. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; The<br />box on the table was the only thing in the room with him, besides the table<br />itself, which seems to be built into the floor. He approached the table<br />cautiously. Eyes had adjusted some to the light, but there was still not much<br />to see. The legs and table appeared to be built of high strength </span></i><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">metal</span></i><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">, </span></i><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">not</span></i><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span></i><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">breakable</span></i><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span></i><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">by</span></i><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> hand. </span></i><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">The</span></i><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> package seemed like any other white shipping<br />box, sealed in white duct tape end to end. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; The<br />table was cool to the touch, not cold, but cool, like everything else in this<br />room, floor, walls, etc. Ash pealed at the tape slowly, ready to react to its<br />contents. This box was obviously here for him, it was the only thing in the<br />room, and no-one had reacted to his being awake. Laying the tape aside he<br />opened the lid and found an iPhone, neatly wrapped in plastic. He opened the<br />bag and turned on the phone. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; It<br />booted silently… </span></i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">***<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash woke up in a sweat… it was that stupid dream again! The same dream… for<br />8 years. PTSD came in all shapes and sizes… for Theron Ashland it came in the<br />form of recurring dreams, nightmares really. Some doctors told him it was<br />suppressed memory. Others told him that it was his mind trying to make sense of<br />the missing time. He wasn't sure himself.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Regaining sleep was unlikely. The clock read 4:07 am. Ash had a few hours<br />before he had to head to the school to start his day full of students’ excuses<br />for misbehaving, and professors’ excuses for their students test results.<br />Things were so much simpler when you could just shoot your enemy. How he ever<br />agreed to accept a position involving people, he'd never understand. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Still, a steady paycheck in post military retirement was more than many<br />Vet's hoped for. Maybe some extra calisthenics would help erase the bizarre and<br />bring him back to reality… again. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">By 6:00 am, Ash was heading to the school for another day, and he stopped<br />off at the Grounded Café for a do-over from last night. As he walked in, Mike,<br />the usual morning Barista </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">nodded</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> "I'll have it right up for you Ash.<br />It's on the house today, thanks for keeping us safe last night man. I heard all<br />about it…" <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash nodded back, "Thanks Mike! I'm a little out of practice though…<br />that little old man is stronger than he looks." They both laughed, and Ash<br />took a seat in his favorite leather chair, in his corner. He was skimming<br />through </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">the</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">local</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> paper,<br />when he noticed another man come and sit in the chair beside him. He tried to<br />ignore him, but he could see from his peripheral that the man was just staring<br />straight at him. He couldn't focus to read a single headline, and so he put the<br />paper down on his lap and smiled at the man. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Small stature, balding in the front, large square glasses. "How can I<br />help you mister…?" <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Briar. Dr. Briar. I was most impressed with your show of heroism last<br />night Airman. I apologize for calling you Marine, I know how you boys like to<br />keep yourselves distinguished from each other. The thing is, I've never seen a<br />member of the Air Force fight like that. Pardon me for saying, but I've always<br />thought of you Airman as more brains than brawn, if you know what I mean."<br />Dr. Briar smiled, warmly. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"No offense taken, I've just had more than my fair share of </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">run</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">-ins, and I've<br />picked a few fights with those Marines you mentioned as well." <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Tell me Mr. ...." <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Ash, just call me Ash."<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Thank you. Tell me Ash, I couldn't help but notice that you were<br />looking at the man rather odd, just before he jumped on you. It was not the<br />face of strange curiosity that most of the bystanders had. There was something…<br />unique... about the way you looked at him? What was that about?" <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Images of the dark cloud, the figure, the small frantic creature danced in<br />his head for a moment. Ash passed it off, "Dr. Briar… </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">is</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">it</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">? I suppose I<br />was just gearing up for the fight. Those of us with training tend to view<br />conflict a bit different from other folks."&nbsp; <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Ash!" Mike the Barista was calling.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Turning to Dr. Briar, "Coffee's ready… I have to go to work now."<br /><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"I see… well, thank you for satisfying my curiosity." Dr. Briar<br />stood, and put out his hand. Ash stood, and took it with a firm shake.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"So long Dr. Briar, nice to meet you." Ash grabbed his coffee and<br />headed out the door. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: center;"><br /><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">***<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">Leaving CO<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">Desc: Eta is on leave,<br />decides to head to L.A. to find the mystery man from her dreams<o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Eta woke up at 9:09 am, as usual. Her day started out normal enough. Then<br />during a raid on a local drug den, she was knocked over by some punk kid who<br />couldn't have been more than 22 years old. He got away! <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">How could she have been so<br />careless? Boss Man said that it could happen to anyone, but she knew she wasn't<br />OK. And she let her team down, and a suspect got away. She needed to take time<br />to clear her head, before someone got hurt. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">They'd been begging her to<br />use her time off anyway, she'd accrued the stuff for three years straight<br />without using any. So she took a paid leave for six weeks. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">That ought to be </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">enough</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"> time for this to pass over... <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Or drive her nuts. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">One way or the other, this<br />will be settled. </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Eta placed her keys on one of the hooks by the door, and her purse<br />on the other. If you can call a kevlar fanny pack a purse. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">She locked the dead bolt, three times. Set the alarm code, 3. 3.<br />3. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Eta glanced to the inspirational photo of a waterfall, framed on<br />the wall, a constant reminder, <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">"Nine represents achievement and completion, when all has<br />been put right, and in order. Order is control. Control is power. Power is<br />defense. Master Xua Chi".<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Defense against the world, people, but mostly, herself. Self<br />cannot be trusted. Above all else, self must be controlled. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Eta glanced the place over, everything is where she left it.<br />Windows and doors secure. Sounds correct. Smells check. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">She let out a sigh, shoulders relaxed. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Glocks, still holstered, were placed on the bed, under the pillow.<br />Eta walked to the kitchen, poured hot water into a teacup, then parked herself<br />at the desk by the window. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">The desk was close enough for light and fresh air, but just out of<br />the line of sight from other tall buildings and potential sniper nests. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">She rotated the blinds, so that no one could see in. The screen<br />came to life, the cursor blinking in the long rectangular box. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Eta tried searching, "visions", "psychic".<br />Every search brought with it a rabbit trail of charlatan websites looking to<br />make money off of the unsuspecting fools who dared to believe their trickery.<br />No real science. No exploration. Nothing to explain her situation. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">"What is happening to me?" Eta sighed. The sights and<br />sounds of the bombing were fresh in her mind. The news channels didn't do it<br />justice. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">She'd been there... somehow. She could smell the explosive<br />materials, she could see the bombers face when he put the backpack in the trash<br />can. He was frightened, not bold. He looked at the people around him so sadly.<br />Then he walked away, head down, crying.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">They caught him this morning, thanks in part to her tip off, she<br />hoped. He looked surprised on the T.V. Like he didn't know how he'd been<br />caught. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">This does not bode well for the order she'd crafted for her life.<br />There had to be logical rational answers for this phenomena. Or was this just<br />the past catching up with her. Something finally snapped inside, and she'd gone<br />nuts afterall? <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">After hours of nothing concrete coming up in the searches, Eta<br />closed the laptop lid, and sat back in the chair. She rubbed her neck, and<br />eyes. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">They burned, she must have forgotten to blink again. Eta laid down<br />on the bed, and stared at the ceiling until sleep overtook her. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">She's late for an appointment. What appointment? She doesn't know.<br />She's just sitting here in the food court, with her laptop, waiting for...<br />someone? The sign on the wall says Sky Mall. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">She's been here a while, she's not sure how long. Time ticks on,<br />clicking away on the keyboard, search after search brings no relief. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">She looks down and there are lockers. A man walks up, black jeans,<br />black jacket with a Carhart logo, grey beany. He opens the locker, and pulls<br />some things out.<o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Just as he is about to turn around, there is a flash of bright<br />light, and he is gone. No bomb this time, he's just gone. She needs to meet<br />him. But why? <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Eta sat up. Had she been asleep? Not sure. Another vision? She'd pulled her<br />last $3,000.00 </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">from savings</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">, on the way home last night. She'd planned<br />to drop by the airport and take the first one way flight to anywhere but here. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">A few taps on the keys revealed a Sky Mall in Los Angeles California. Ten<br />minutes from Union Station, and L.A.X. Perfect, she could walk from the<br />airport. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"I guess L.A. counts as 'anywhere but here'..." Eta said. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Janice was more than willing to drop her off on one condition. "Take<br />pictures, and bring me back an amazing story of your adventures! And if it's<br />boring... Just make something up for me!" <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">She looked out the plane window, it wasn't as impressive without the thrill<br />of a parachute strapped to your back. Eta closed her eyes, and sleep came,<br />eventually. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: center;"><br /><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">***<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">Terminate<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">Desc: <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Dr. Briar watched Ash leave, as he sat back down to his tablet at the table<br />in the back of the Café. He stared down at his screen, which showed vital signs<br />playing alongside a recording of the event as it had unfolded the night before.<br />Dr. Briar pulled up the private Instant Message, and began typing. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Note: Subject A reacted to the white noise, even 10 years after the end of<br />his experiment. Elevated vital signs, and increased erratic behavior were<br />nearly instant. Subject B showed signs of elevated vitals, but he was attacked,<br />which could be the reason. Subjectively, I feel he saw something; however, even<br />after my interview with him this morning, the data was inconclusive. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Status Recommendation:<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Subject A: Terminate.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Subject B: Observe.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Dr. Briar pressed enter, and took a sip of his Carmel Macchiato. For a few<br />minutes the cursor remained empty, blinking on the screen as he watched the sea<br />of humanity passing by. If they only knew… is this what it was like for the<br />dinosaurs? Just roaming about their territory, eating and pursuing each other<br />until one day… an explosion changed everything?<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">One of his experiments had managed to ellude them, despite their<br />precautions. The frustrating part, was that despite his vast resources, and<br />well paid hackers, this experiment remained elusive. They knew who they had<br />thought he was. Until they realized that the person they thought they had,<br />didn't exist. By then it was too late. He'd shown great promise during the<br />experiments. His brain scans were clean. Text book case study. The only problem<br />was that he didn't exist. When they went to find him for a check-in, he was<br />missing, and the alias turned out to be empty.
