Ryan Wrecking never existed. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">They couldn't find him, but they could put a stop to the madness before it<br />got any further out of hand. Already they'd eliminated 25 of the most extreme<br />cases, the ones gone wrong, the liabilities. They must put a lid on this mess<br />before there was any more exposure to the program. A message popped up. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Assign: <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Subject A: Terminate.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Subject B: Terminate.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Dr. Briar may have been many things, but he was assuming that taking the<br />life of a man who was not showing signs of being a danger to himself or others<br />was just beyond his moral line. font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Dr. Briar suddenly felt ill. It's hard to imagine that just a few short<br />years ago, he'd been a respected scientist. Sure, he worked on the fringe of<br />science. But how had he come to this? Reduced to putting down his own test<br />subjects? This was the price he'd paid to touch the edges of the known universe<br />and rip them open. This was the price he'd paid to have his funding needs met<br />by an "interested party". Only too late did he realize, too<br />interested. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: center;"><br /><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">***<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">Negative Noise<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">Desc: Ash dreams of the<br />dark room, wakes up and he's attacked. You are to sit in the chair for another period of time, also<br />to be determined. That is all. Within a few weeks, you will leave no worse for<br />the ware, unless this works. In which case, you will be better for the<br />ware." &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; That was all it said. font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">circadian</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">rhythms</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> w</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">ere</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">off</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">. Ash wakes to<br />the sound of his food being delivered for breakfast, </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">fold</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">, </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">his</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">only</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">measuring</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> stick.<br />He eats in silence. He doesn't even hear the static from above anymore<span style="background: yellow; mso-highlight: yellow;">.</span> When he is done he<br />places his tray on the shelf and it disappears into the wall again.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; *Click* The <span style="background: yellow; mso-highlight: yellow;">sound</span> in the overhead turns<br />off. "Well… that's new." Ash said the first words he'd spoken in<br />days. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; The air pressure changes as<br />a slight crack in the wall snaps open. The crack opens wider as the panel<br />disappears into the wall. *Whoosh*, the crack becomes a doorway, which opens<br />into a long hall. Since this is the first interaction he's had since he woke up<br />in the looney bin, he decided it was better to investigate the new, than stay<br />in the old. Ash makes his way down the long hall, lit with blue LED's </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">this</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> time.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; He makes his way into a<br />room, approximately 15 by 15. The door shuts behind him. The floor is built<br />from a hatch work of solid wire. Very sturdy; however, unnerving as you can see<br />several feet beneath the floor which is covered in deep triangular </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">foam</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">, </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">of</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> <span lang="EN">various </span></span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">sizes</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">and</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> depths. The<br />walls, ceiling, all made of the same substance. One chair, bolted to a frame on<br />the floor. It looks comfortable enough. Like a dentist chair. Seeing no other<br />option, he takes the chair. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Upon taking his seat, the<br />lights are turned off. The only thing Ash could see was the flashes of white<br />dots dancing around his eyes from having been in the light moments earlier.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; The silence is deafening.<br />Ash clapped his hand once, and noticed that the clap was hallow, as though the<br />walls took the sound and sucked it out away from him, then wouldn't give it<br />back. If it were possible for sound to be less than nothing, this was it. The<br />sound was sucked right out of him, so that all he could hear was his own<br />breathing. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">After</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">about ten minutes, his</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> ears began ringing. It started subtle, but grew worse. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; When the ringing subsided,<br />he could hear the beating of his own heart, and the sloshing of bodily fluids<br />throughout his own body.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Having spent the last<br />several days in what he would have called silence, all of Ash's racing thoughts<br />had subsided. He's moved past wondering where he is, when he'll leave, he's now<br />just him. Alone with his thoughts. And increasingly, his past.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; He could almost hear his<br />own thoughts. As though that voice in his head, that was always present,<br />telling him what to do, and where to go, and how to act, watch out for that...<br />don't say that... oh man, what did you do that for? It was as though the inner<br />voice became almost audible. As though he could hear himself think. Or rather<br />as though his thoughts could speak to him audibly. It was an odd sensation, but<br />occupying his mind was the only thing he could do. He'd never admit it to a<br />captor, but solitary confinement was his favorite part of being a prisoner of<br />war. He enjoyed self-time, silence. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Now</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">though</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">, alone<br />in the dark now, with no sound of any kind, negative sound. He sits. Lays back<br />in the reclining dentist chair, and he waits. He waits. Eventually, after what<br />seemed like hours, Ash started to fall asleep. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; He did not know how long<br />he'd been asleep, but his concentration suddenly snapped into focus with the<br />feeling that he was not alone in this room. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; He'd known before he<br />entered the room that cameras were on him, and he was being observed... but<br />that wasn't it. He felt the air in the room change, as though someone had<br />entered the room with him. He could hear breathing in the room. He wasn't tied<br />to the chair, he could get up, but where to? He couldn't see, he'd memorized<br />the layout though. He knew the entrance he came from, and he didn't see any<br />other known entry ways before the door shut out the light. Ash slowed his<br />breathing, and observed with his four remaining senses for any clue as to the<br />whereabouts, and intention, of the new participant. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; "Ash..." a voice<br />whispered from all around him.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; "Ash... " He sits<br />up. How long was he asleep? Is he asleep now? How would you know in dark<br />silence?<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; "Ash... we know about<br />you Ash... We know who you are... Fraud! </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Failure</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">! </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Hypocrite</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">!" The voices were filled with pain, and<br />anger.&nbsp; <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash shakes his head... the voices vanish. For the first time since entering<br />this crazy place, Ash felt fear creep into his spine. Those voices… they almost<br />sounded like… them. Images flashed through his mind of the wars he'd fought,<br />the people he'd killed for God and country. Was it for God? Who's god? The god<br />of good oil prices? What country? The one that left him to rot in an Iranian<br />prison, because we could not admit we had been there to begin with? </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Disavowed</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">they</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">it</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">. </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Escape</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">required</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">cruel</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">and</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">him</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Through the silence a buzzing grew steadily... startling him<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Bzz. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Bzz. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash woke up. Still in his hammock. He pulled his phone from the pocket of<br />his jacket next to him. 3:17 am, 10 new messages from the same unknown number.<br />He opened the messages, and they all read the same. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"ATTACK IS IMMINENT!!!!”<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash felt his senses come alive, 25 years of drills and real life base<br />attacks had drilled that message into his DNA. His focus came alive, and his<br />hearing and sight became acute. Ash steadied his breath. He didn't move, not<br />yet, he wanted to know what direction? What attack? In Oregon? Really? He<br />started to assume that this was a prank being pulled by one of the new cadets.<br />He got out of the hammock and walked to the kitchen to get some water. He still<br />didn't feel right though. Something was off. He placed the glass on the counter<br />and… <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash heard </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">the</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> front door open, and then close softly. It could be a prank, and if so, he<br />didn't want to accidentally shoot one of his students. At the same time, 10<br />messages is enough to put him on edge, so he quietly pulled his side arm from<br />the drawer, but holstered it in the back of his pants. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">He also grabbed his </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">custom</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> Survival Knife from the drawer.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ducking down behind the island, he used the glass reflection to watch the<br />hallway. Two men entered the hallway, geared up in all black, using </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">professional</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Russian</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> hand<br />signals. They moved silently, and they were built for battle. These were no<br />students. Ash watched as they made their way to the porch, where his hammock<br />still looked like it was being slept in. Intended to fool students pulling a<br />prank, but just as handy when being attacked for real. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">He started to rise, so that he could work his way to a better defensive<br />position, then a bright light made him pull back. He couldn't see anything for<br />a few moments. When the light </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">cleared</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">, he could see the men on the porch as they<br />approached the hammock, and then opened fire on it. Ash holstered his knife,<br />and went back to his side arm. He took several shallow breaths, followed by one<br />deep breath, steadied his focus. He could see the hammock, and its contents<br />falling apart. He stood, worked quickly to get behind the couch, which he had<br />special made for just such an occasion. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">You never can be too paranoid... or is that prepared? He could never tell<br />the difference. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">He crouched behind, on one knee, fired several shots into the nearest<br />target. The assailant flailed forward into his counterpart and then went over<br />the balcony. Stunned by the commotion, the other remaining member turned to see<br />where the shots came from, too late. Ash emptied the remaining rounds and he<br />went down. Ash re-loaded, and approached with caution. He kicked the weapon<br />aside, and checked for life in the assailant. DOA. A glance over the edge<br />revealed no change of survival there either. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash stripped the man of anything useful, then picked up him up, and threw<br />him off the balcony to hang out with his friend. Ash grabbed the man's rifle,<br />and swept the house for more.&nbsp; Clear.<br />This was an AN-94, advanced Russian assault rifle, way too expensive for<br />general issue to the Russian military or police. This was a special breed that<br />had the balls to enter his house. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Who sent them? What in the world did they want with a retired professor?<br />Surely it can't be a grudge from his special forces days? That was over eight<br />years ago, then again, people like Ash never really retire. They just go<br />dormant, to be pulled back in a moment's notice. Which is why he still had a<br />Commanding Office (C.O.) to report to quarterly. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">When he knew the coast was clear, he called his C.O. to report the<br />incident. No reason for the civilians of this sleepy town to know that there<br />had been a Russian attack on US Soil, they'll send a sanitation team to make it<br />look like it never happened. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"General Akbar… Sir this can't be an isolated incident. I need to go<br />dark and find out what's going on." <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Understood Ash. Check in every two weeks, and we'll see what we can<br />find on our end. We'll let the school know we called you into active duty on<br />short term notice. They won't ask any questions. And Ash… be careful. I don’t<br />like the smell of this one." <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Roger. I'll check </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">back</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> in two weeks." <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash threw together his hiking pack, and necessities. He pulled his cash<br />from the </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">stow</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">-away hidden </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">in</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> the back of the couch. He took one last<br />glance at his cabin, now a little less beautiful than before… sighed, and<br />walked out the door. The sanitation team would be here before light. And he<br />needed to be gone by then too. Ash pulled the bike out from the garage. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">He didn't ride the Vulcan often, but he really enjoyed it. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">He</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> really did need </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">to</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">get</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">out</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> more, even if<br />it </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">takes</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">people</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> looking<br />to assassinate </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">you</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">, </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">to</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">get</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">you</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">out</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">of</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> town. He glanced both directions. He'd set<br />up safeties in Washington and California. "Heck, let's make like the birds<br />and head south for the winter", he stated. He pointed the nose down the<br />road, and took off. Making sure to keep to back roads, but ones with multiple<br />exit paths. "Russians…" he pondered, "what do the <span style="background: yellow; mso-highlight: yellow;">Russians</span> want?" <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: center;"><br /><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Dr. Briar pulled up the private Instant Message, and began typing. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Subject A: Terminated<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Subject B: Termination<br />Failed, Escaped, On the run. Cannot find him. Lost two units.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">There was a long silence. Butterfly's flew around in his belly, and his<br />hands grew cold. The Benefactor, as he was called, did not take kindly to<br />failure; however, he was also a cold calculator. He was hard, but not rash. As<br />long as Dr. Briar was still valuable he would not receive his direct wrath.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Return, regroup.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">A wave of<br />relief washed over him. He was still valuable, for now. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Heard<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">He picked<br />up his phone, and pressed speed dial. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">"Welcome<br />to Esion, this is Clara speaking, how may I help you?"<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">"Clara,<br />this is Dr. Briar. Get my plane ready, I'm leaving in one hour... Oh, and hire<br />two more assistance, I seem to have lost mine."<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">"Yes<br />sir Dr. Briar, right away." He pressed the big red disconnect button, and<br />sat in the cafe for a few moments, pondering his next moves. He would not be<br />allowed to fail again. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: center;"><br /><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">***<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">Mystery Man<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">Desc: Eta is pursueing<br />a vision of a man at a locker, she has to find him. It turns out, he's her old<br />partner from spec ops, Ash.<o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">The Los Angeles Sky Mall was bustling with humanity, roaming about like so<br />many ants building a colony without knowing why. Eta sat in the food court<br />tables just outside the Chick Filet, overlooking the railing down to the first<br />floor, in perfect view of the lockers. She couldn't get the latest vision out<br />of her head. After that incident a few weeks ago with the Boston Marathon, she<br />was officially freaking out. Then this new vision started up. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">She's sitting in this exact spot, and a some guy in black jeans, a black<br />jacket with a Carhart logo, and a grey beany steps up to a locker, he turns<br />around ... Vision Over.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"I'm not sure who this guy is" she said to no one "... or<br />why I </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">used</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> my vacation<br />time on short notice and </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">the</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">last</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">of</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> my </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">emergency</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">fund</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> to fly out to<br />Los Angeles to sit in this chair. All I know is, if he has any clues, about why<br />I'm seeing stuff before it happens, it's worth a shot to come find out."<br />Eta shook her head, "You're talking to yourself again girl, get a<br />grip…" <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">So she waits… and waits. She's been here all day, every day with her laptop<br />surfing the Wi-Fi... waiting. She's had only this vision, every night, for two<br />weeks since the Boston Bombing. So here she sits, waiting. Day 12… hotels and<br />fast food. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Bouncing from site to site, Google providing no solid answers, she's now<br />attempting to use the other search engines, hoping for different results. She's<br />hit up Bing, Yahoo, DuckDuckGo... she's moved on to deep web searches. Checking<br />out the Library of Congress, National Security Archive, Virtual Library,<br />Infomine... grasping for answers. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">There were a few articles about paranormal studies and research. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Did she hear voices? No. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">See things she can't explain? Yes. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Did she have the feeling she was being watched by a close loved one? No. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">She laughed so abruptly a few people turned around to look at her for a<br />moment. The thought was hilarious. There were articles about people coming back<br />from war with strange mental reactions, and being misdiagnosed with PTSD.<br />Paranormal research was hard to wade through, for every non-biased scientific<br />evaluation, she found 1,000's of kooks and quacks that ranged from television<br />psychics to religious evangelists. All of them wanting to provide you with<br />answers, for the low cost of... or a love gift of... <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Eta was on her fourth cup of Venti Soy Chai Tea Latte for the day when she<br />saw him. Out of the corner of her eye, there was a man with dark blue jeans,<br />nearly black. A black jacket with a Carhart label on the shoulder, and a grey<br />beany... he was headed in the direction of the </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">lockers. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">She gasped. Pulse<br />quickened, muscles tensed.</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Eta</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> tried to look casual, in case he turned her<br />direction. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">If Special Forces training had taught her anything it was how to observe<br />without being seen. He was headed straight for the locker... and then passed<br />it, and headed out of </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">sight</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">down</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">the</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">halls</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">to</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">the</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> bathrooms.<br />She wouldn't have the time to get down there and follow, and the vision was<br />about this locker, so she decided against her inner desire to pursue and kept<br />up with her searches. If that was the guy, he'd be back. If it wasn't, she'd<br />miss the real person she was here to see. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">More searches turning interesting tidbits of useless data. It's a decent distraction,<br />but she's no closer to the answer. Eta stares into the crowds below as they<br />meander through the mall. Out of the corner of her eye she sees the man again,<br />walking away from the lockers. He disappears underneath her, toward the exit.<br />She sits debating, "Should I go follow, or stay and wait?" She<br />decides that the vision has her in this seat, and him at that locker. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Hello Ms.?" <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Eta is startled by a young man holding a heart shaped box. "Yes?"<br /><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"This is for you, have a great day", the young man starts to take<br />off. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Wait, sir… this can't be for me." He turns back to face her.<br />"I don't know anyone here. You got the wrong person." <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"No Ma'am. You are the one. He pointed to you, black leather jacket,<br />laptop, purple hair. He said to give this to you." he turned and walked<br />away. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Eta looked around, she felt the icy tinge run through her spine. She could<br />feel her breathing quicken, and her skin tighten. Glancing in through the<br />crowd, she could not locate any immediate danger. Eta put her ear to the box to<br />listen for mechanical devices. It was light, too light to be a bomb. She opened<br />it, and there was a note inside. "Why did you open this box? Haven't I<br />taught you anything? Gotcha! Over Please." She recognized the hand writing<br />instantly. "Hey there slugger! Nice avoidance technique, almost didn't<br />notice you there. What are you doing here?"&nbsp; It may have been eight years, but they were<br />partners for longer than that. She stood up, glancing around. She didn't see him.<br />She looked toward the locker, there he was. The man in the black jacket pulled<br />a backpack from the locker, and turned around. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Of all the crazy… ", she said. Her muscles relaxed. Eta folded<br />her arms, feigning annoyance, and nodded her head calling him over. The she sat<br />down. She took a deep breath, and sighed. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash walked up to her, smiling. He'd aged well. "Time has been hard on<br />you, huh tough guy?" <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"It's done wonders for you slugger. They dismantle that group,<br />and Chester takes them to a safe place.<o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Before they could make it into the front door, Ash heard something, and<br />motioned for Eta to follow, making their way to the alley beside Denny's. As<br />they rounded the corner they heard voices, and they didn't sound pleasant.<br />Curiosity got the better of Ash who peaked into the alley to assess the<br />situation. Eta made a grumpy face, but followed. "Ash" she whispered,<br />"we're trying to stay off the grid. Let's not get in the middle of<br />something we'll need to explain to police." He motioned to keep her voice<br />down, and glanced around the corner. Three… no four, Latino men, armed with<br />hand guns. All dressed in sagging jean shorts, white ribbed under shirts, and<br />button down plaid, with only the top button together. Blue bandanas wrapped<br />around their arms.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Chester, Chester… it's been a long time since we've seen you around<br />boy? You ain't buying no more, or what?" The smallest guy was doing the<br />talking. Shaved head, snake tattoo on his neck running up and over his skull.<br />"You still owe us that program you promised boy. The one that would get us<br />into people's accounts. Where'd you disappear to essay?!" Turning to the<br />chunky guy on his left, "Gordo, what's it been, two… three years since<br />we've seen this punk? Since he promised us a program in exchange for our merchandise?<br />I think it's time to pay up Sancha!" <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash could see the shadowy figures rising up and around the four guys. Never<br />quite solid, but so often present in situations like these, with shady people.<br />Then a light caught his eye. He noticed the gleam first, and then the whole<br />scene exploded into bright light. Ash backed away, temporarily blinded. After a<br />few blinks, he could see a very large man, brown hair, dressed in all white,<br />with a gold belt and long sword. He was standing behind the victim, but looking<br />straight at Ash. He smiled, motioned to the four assailants, nodded approval,<br />and then… disappeared again. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash motioned to Eta. Four assailants. Armed. One victim. Cover me, from<br />over there. I'm going in. Eta pulled her side arm, and sighed. "Really?"<br />she whispered, "I took vacation time to come to LA and shoot<br />gangsters?"&nbsp; Eta silently made her<br />way to just behind the parked car. She stayed in the shadows between the car<br />and the wall, but kept her side arm pointed at the group. Ash adjusted his<br />chest holster within easy reach of his slightly open jacket, and walked down<br />the alley as though he didn't see the crowd. They were so busy they didn't see<br />or hear him as he approached. He walked right up next to the largest of the<br />bunch and stood there for a while. They were so busy being bully's they didn't<br />even notice him. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Amateurs. Tired of being ignored; "Fellas, what's with the<br />party!?" he screamed out with his best impression of a loud drunk. Snake<br />head whipped around, followed by everyone else. Tiny looked the most surprised,<br />which made sense considering the guy was standing right next to him and he<br />didn't notice. Snake head put on his best bravado stance. "You lost<br />boracho? I think you need to move along… " <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Why? I was just leaving the bar and my friend had disappeared. I was<br />looking all over for you buddy, where did you go?" Motioning at the<br />victim. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Snake head didn't give him time to respond. "You have 60 seconds to<br />leave, before you become a part of this party amigo… and trust me, you don't<br />want to be a part of this party." <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash straightened up a little, still putting on a drunk show. "I'll<br />tell you what amigo…." He swallowed. "I'll give you and your friends<br />10 seconds to leave this alley before I ruin your party and take my friend with<br />me." <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Snake head had enough; "Tiny… get rid of this guy, huh?" Tiny<br />pointed his gun at Ash's head… and the world slowed down. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash moved in to Tiny's space, pushing the gun away from this body, stepped<br />on his toes, pulled his knee into the opposite inner thigh, simultaneously<br />taking his gun, and hitting him in the nose with the butt of the gun. With one<br />big shove he knocked Tiny into the guy behind him and they both went down. Ash<br />whipped around, in two quick strides and hit the third guy in the throat so<br />hard that he dropped his gun and went down to the ground with both hands on his<br />neck trying to breathe. Finally, he side stepped to Snake Head, and with one<br />hand took Snake Head’s gun hand and held it pointed to the ground, and with the<br />gun he'd just taken from tiny, and pointed it right between his eyes. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">By this point two of the assailants were still nursing wounds while the<br />third had recovered and was starting to point his weapon at Ash. Just then the<br />gun flew out of the guys hand, as a faint swoosh could be heard from down the<br />alley. He grabbed his hand in immense pain as it was now bleeding profusely.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash, no longer pretending to be a drunk, looked Snake Head directly in the<br />eye. "So here's how this goes. A) you and your friends leave your weapons<br />in the alley and take your friend to the hospital to have his hand looked at.<br />B) you all leave here in body bags as my friend back there picks you off like<br />ducks at a carnival shooting gallery."<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Snake Head hesitated for a few moments, then dropped his gun, as did the others.<br />The four of them ran out of the alley, right past Eta who stayed hidden so they<br />wouldn't see where she'd fired from. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash picked up the weapons and put on the safeties before loading two into<br />his belt. He threw the others to Eta who had come down the alley by now, sure<br />that the four had left for good. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"You're getting rusty old man."&nbsp;<br />Eta half smiled. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash returned a smirk and then turned to their new friend. "You have a<br />name kid?" <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Chester…" he managed, a bit shaken from the encounter. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Well Chester, we'll need to get moving before they gather the courage<br />to return with the rest of their gang, or police come after someone reports the<br />commotion. Anyplace you know that we can go and be safe from them, and the<br />police for that matter?" Ash said.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"And maybe some food?" Eta shrugged, "This kind of<br />interrupted our dinner plans."<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Yeah… sure… this way…" Chester motioned to the street and the<br />three of them left the alley. They made their way to the Union Gospel Mission. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Chester waived to the night guard, "Albert. These two are with<br />me."<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"OK, sounds good. Just sign them in Mr. Chester." The guard was<br />older, he looked like he could hold his own, but he wasn't going on any<br />marathons any time soon either. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Who were those guys?" Eta asked as they ate a free meal. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"It's a long story. Suffice it to say that they were part of a life I<br />no longer live. By the way, not that I'm not grateful… but where did you two<br />learn to do that CIA, Kung Fu, Ninja stuff back there?" <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Eta and Ash glanced at each other and smiled. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"It's a long story…" Ash stated. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Chester smiled. "I see what you did there."<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Eta kept her eyes on the doors and windows. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Chester followed her glance, "Well hey, seriously, if you want to<br />avoid prying eyes, the mission might not be the best place for you two to stay<br />tonight. Most of the residents are long term bums, and are still discussing the<br />conspiracy behind the Kennedy assassination, or Roswell. But we do get a few<br />savvy's in now and then, and if your faces are on the news or anything, they<br />might know. They'd take the opportunity for a tip line reward." Chester<br />glanced at the wall for a moment, and turned back to them. "Why don't you<br />stay at my place? It's big enough."<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Are you sure it's a good idea to invite total strangers to your house<br />Chester?" Ash put up his hands, "Not that I mind." <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Listen. Strange you are. Weird…. Maybe even a little scary. But two<br />people who would walk into an alley to save a guy they don't know with super<br />cool Ninja moves like that, and then let the crooks live? If you meant me harm,<br />we wouldn't be here right now. Besides… there's something about you… I can't<br />put my finger on it, but I feel like we were meant to meet tonight, and I<br />always trust my gut. It’s always done me right. Besides it's the least I can do<br />after you risked your lives to save me. Win-Win in my book." <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Good enough for me. It's a viable option.
